_notes.VisibilityTimeout: 60 seconds — gives the Lambda function enough time to process a batch before the message becomes visible again (Lambda timeout is 30s, so 60s provides a safety margin).
_notes.MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 seconds (24 hours) — messages not processed within 24 hours are discarded.
_notes.maxReceiveCount: 3 — a message is retried up to 3 times before being routed to view-events-dlq (satisfies Requirement 8.4).
_notes.deadLetterTargetArn: Replace <region> and <account-id> with actual values, or use the output of create-queues.sh.
